Our flagship space, The Grand Ballroom, is a stunning 8,000-square-foot room featuring soaring 24-foot ceilings, crystal chandeliers, and floor-to-ceiling windows that flood the space with natural light. The room can be configured for seated dinners, cocktail receptions, or theater-style presentations.

Highlights

  • Stunning crystal chandelier centerpiece
  • Built-in sound system and stage
  • Adjustable LED lighting in any color palette
  • Direct access to outdoor terrace
  • Private bridal suite adjacent

image.alt: Grand ballroom with crystal chandeliers and elegant decor

body.processed:
Surrounded by lush landscaping, the Garden Terrace is a romantic outdoor space perfect for ceremonies and receptions under the stars. Featuring manicured hedges, a stone fountain, and twinkling string lights, this space captures the essence of al fresco elegance.

Highlights

  • Manicured gardens with seasonal blooms
  • Stone fountain centerpiece
  • String light canopy
  • Covered pavilion for weather backup
  • Dedicated bar area
body.summary: Surrounded by lush landscaping, the Garden Terrace is a romantic outdoor space perfect for ceremonies and receptions under the stars. Featuring manicured hedges, a stone fountain, and twinkling string

image.alt: Beautiful garden terrace with string lights and fountain

body.processed:
Perched atop The Sterling Estate, our Rooftop Lounge offers panoramic city views and a modern, sophisticated atmosphere. This contemporary space is ideal for cocktail parties, corporate mixers, and milestone celebrations with a view.

Highlights

  • 360-degree panoramic city views
  • Modern lounge furniture
  • Full-service bar with craft cocktails
  • Fire pit gathering area
  • Climate-controlled retractable roof

image.alt: Rooftop lounge with city skyline views at sunset

body.processed:
Our intimate Chapel is a beautifully restored historic space featuring original stained glass windows, exposed brick walls, and warm wood accents. Perfect for wedding ceremonies, vow renewals, and small, meaningful gatherings.

Highlights

  • Original stained glass windows
  • Exposed brick and wood beams
  • Baby grand piano
  • Natural acoustics
  • Candlelit ambiance
